title: biscutella laevigata subsp. kerneri
intro: Biscutella laevigata subsp. kerneri, also known as Kern's biscutella, is a plant species within the family Brassicaceae. It is used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving digestion, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antifungal activities. In herbal preparations, Biscutella laevigata subsp. kerneri is often used to make infusions, tinctures, and teas, which can be consumed to leverage its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
